compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1000e DE, Pro 600e, Pro 1000e DE Flex
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: proprietary Gavita e-series bus (RJ 4P4C controller side / RJ 6P4C fixture side)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, auto-shutdown, sunrise/sunset ramping, independent light cycles per channel, PID fan-light coordination, event logging
compatible_devices.notes: 2 channels; up to 80 single bus / 1000 repeater bus fixtures; flip-flop mode for two rooms on alternating or overlapping light cycles; 2 EC fan outputs; 2 FB1 fan balancers supported; alarm contacts (NC/NO)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1700e LED, Pro 900e LED, CT1930e LED
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable (HGC906716 / HGC906717)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, sunrise/sunset ramping, independent light cycles, PID fan coordination
compatible_devices.notes: LED adapter cable mandatory; dimming range 50-100% for LED; 2 channels allow two independent LED rooms; EL2F fan control coordinates with LED dimming for temperature management

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: PID auto-tuning fan speed per channel, temperature-based ramp, FB1 fan balancer for intake/exhaust offset
compatible_devices.notes: 2 EC fan outputs; up to 4 fans; control range 10-100%; 0-10V signal via 4P4C RJ9; Gavita Vector fans are primary confirmed compatible brand; 2 FB1 Fan Balancers supported for precise intake/exhaust management across two rooms; third-party 0-10V EC fans require wiring adapter

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 0-10V (4P4C RJ9) to EFM1, then AC mains to fan
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita EFM1 External Fan Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-based fan speed control via EFM1, burst-modulated AC at low speed, phase-cut at high speed
compatible_devices.notes: EFM1 exclusively compatible with EL1F/EL2F Gen 2 (not EL1/EL2); max 6A/240V (1.44kW) per EFM1; any AC fan within EFM1 power limits can be controlled; EFM1 plugs inline between mains and fan with data cable to controller

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: lights-on / lights-off timed switching schedule, independently programmable per channel
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only; EL2F has ECM output(s) — sources vary between 1 and 2 ECM ports; independently programmable in Gen 2; ECM1 max 16A AC1 / 1.5kW AC3; ECM1 sold separately

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via ECM1; max 16A AC1; ECM switches any AC device within rated load; ECM1 sold separately

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: lights-on timed switching schedule, independently programmable per channel
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only; CO2 equipment explicitly listed as primary ECM1 use case; max 16A AC1 / 1.5kW AC3 inductive; ECM1 sold separately

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: lights-off timed switching schedule, independently programmable per channel
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only; room heater during lights-off explicitly listed as ECM1 primary use case; max 16A AC1 / 1.5kW AC3; ECM1 sold separately
